name: Florida Bus Unlimited
recent_news: No web presence located; floridabus.net not reachable and no SunBiz/news hits for 'Florida Bus Unlimited' at 1925 W Princeton St Orlando. Possibly inactive, very small, or operating under different name.
fit_notes: Tiny single-yard Orlando operator (~21 employees, ~$0.9M rev) with minimal digital footprint. If real and independent, would be a very small tuck-in for any Florida expansion; verification by phone required before pursuing.

name: Schwartz Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: Received $104,370 PPP loan April 2020 for 40 employees; in business 40+ years per local directories (2026).
fit_notes: Long-tenured family-owned MO operator (since ~1982) with ~40 employees; Schwartz family principal suggests potential succession opportunity. Small tuck-in but classic profile for Summit's rural Midwest expansion.

name: Martini School Bus Co Drs
districts_or_customers: Hazleton Area School District (Butler Township/Drums Area routes)
recent_news: USDOT 1155731 active since 2003; ~65 trucks/55 drivers per public records; also operates 309 Trailer Sales LLC (sister company). Contact appears managed via Rohrer Bus (jschrantz@rohrerbus.com) but Martini operates independently.
website: hasdk12.org (listed as HASD contractor; no own website found)
fit_notes: Family-run (Jack & Roxann Martini) Drums/Hazleton-area HASD contractor with ~55-65 unit fleet — sizeable for the source-data tier. Possible Rohrer Bus management/affiliation needs verification (could already be aligned with a strategic). Solid PA tuck-in candidate if independent.

name: Tita School Bus
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade schools incl. West Hialeah Gardens Elementary, Ernest R. Graham Elementary, Hialeah Gardens Elementary/Middle/High School
recent_news: FL Profit Corp P03000026902 filed 03/06/2003, active. Marketed as '35+ years of experience' (owner-operator tenure). Specializes in door-to-door elementary/middle school transport in W. Hialeah.
fit_notes: Very small (~12-20 employees) owner-operator Hialeah private-school transport business; owner Nelly Mora has 35+ years experience suggesting succession potential. Niche door-to-door model rather than district contract; limited synergy with Summit's district-contract platform but possible Miami-area tuck-in.

name: Bus Contractor
districts_or_customers: Likely North Schuylkill School District and surrounding Ashland/Schuylkill County PA districts
recent_news: Operates as 'Earl G Richards' / 'Richards School Bus Co' per FMCSA (USDOT, 12 power units, 14 drivers, intrastate school bus only). Founder Earl G. Richards died Nov 2010; son Earl L. 'Little Earl' died 2013. Website 'eclatt.com' in source data is unverified/unrelated.
website: unverified (eclatt.com listed in source data does not resolve to this company)
fit_notes: Small (~12-bus) multi-generational Ashland PA Richards family operator; both founder and his namesake son have passed (2010 and 2013), creating clear succession/exit dynamics. Classic micro-tuck-in profile for Summit's PA footprint if current ownership willing to sell.
